problem.title: 🐝 The Beekeeping Crisis in Algeria
problem.subtitle: Real problems beekeepers face daily — the numbers speak for themselves

beesDying.title: Mysterious Bee Deaths
beesDying.desc: Bee colonies suffer from diseases like Varroa and Nosema without early detection, leading to mass die-offs and catastrophic losses

honeyDrop.title: Declining Honey Production
honeyDrop.desc: Without precise monitoring of hive conditions, honey production drops significantly due to disease, poor nutrition, and heat stress

energy.title: Power Problem in Apiaries
energy.desc: Most apiaries are in remote areas without electricity, making hive monitoring impossible without a sustainable power solution

story.title: Why SMART HIVE?
story.description: Traditional beekeepers struggle with long distances between apiaries, spending hours daily traveling to inspect hives. With Smart Hive, you can monitor all your hives from your phone, right from home. Save time and effort, and focus on what truly matters — producing high-quality honey.
points: Monitor all hives from one place
Save 90% of travel time between apiaries

climate.title: 🌡️ Climate Sensors (7)
climate.desc: Temperature (3 types) — Humidity — CO₂ — Light — UV

energy.title: ☀️ Smart Power System
energy.subtitle: Two integrated power methods — one device for all conditions

solar.title: Solar Panel
solar.desc: Clean, sustainable energy charging the device all day long

deepsleep.title: Deep Sleep
deepsleep.desc: Device sleeps 99.9% of the time — wakes, reads, transmits, sleeps again — massive power savings

poe.title: 48V Power
poe.desc: Single cable power for nearby apiaries — simple and efficient

mesh.title: Smart Mesh Network
mesh.subtitle: How do the devices connect to each other?
mesh.description: The Master connects to Slaves via a local Mesh network, and data reaches your phone through WiFi.

ai.title: 🧠 Artificial Intelligence
ai.subtitle: Diagnose diseases before you see them
ai.nvidiaDesc: AI system ready for NVIDIA NeMo upgrade for 99% diagnostic accuracy upon funding

security.title: 🔐 Advanced Security
security.subtitle: Your hive data is protected with the strongest technologies

aes.title: AES-256
aes.desc: Encryption for all transmitted and stored data

rolling.title: Rolling Code
rolling.desc: Key changes every session — even if signal is intercepted

vault.title: 📜 Digital Certificate of Origin
vault.subtitle: First system in Algeria to certify honey with encryption technology

queen.title: 👑 Queen Rearing
queen.subtitle: Precision monitoring 24/7 for queen breeding
queen.monitoringDesc: Precision sensors monitor the incubator 24 hours without interruption
queen.precisionDesc: 3 temperature sensors with 0.1°C accuracy for optimal queen rearing conditions
queen.alertsDesc: Immediate alert if temperature or humidity changes — before the queen is affected

footer.tagline: Smart system for monitoring and managing beehives remotely

activate.title: Register
activate.subtitle: Enter the serial key that came with your device
activate.name: Full Name

welcome.title: Account Activated Successfully!
welcome.subtitle: 🐝 Smart Hive - Smart Beekeepers Community
welcome.redirect: You will be redirected to dashboard in {{count}} seconds...

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link
forgotPassword.sentMessage: A password reset link has been sent to your email.

errors.failed: Failed to send password reset link

master.title: Master Device
master.label: Master
master.desc: Main control unit. Connects to the internet and receives data from all slaves. Equipped with LCD screen, WiFi and Mesh.

slave.title: Slave Device
slave.label: Slave
slave.desc: Monitoring unit placed inside the hive. Measures temperature, humidity, weight, sound, and sends to master.

battery.title: Long Battery Life
battery.desc: Automatic deep sleep to save power

ota.title: OTA Updates
ota.desc: Remote update without opening the device

productDetail.thankYou: Thank you {{name}}, we will contact you soon

errors.phone: Invalid phone number. Must start with 05, 06 or 07 and be 10 digits
